roles.Consumer: Advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT

relationships.description: CAS submits policy feedback to MOT and advocates for passenger rights.

painpoints.description: CAS has criticized fare increases and service disruptions.

roles.Partner: Collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs
roles.Competitor: Competes with Gojek Singapore for ride-hailing customers

painpoints.description: Grab Singapore has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.

roles.Regulator: Regulates public transport operators and oversees licensing compliance for all rail and bus services

relationships.description: MOT supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding.
LTA collaborates with Grab Singapore on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs.
SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.

painpoints.description: LTA faces delays in autonomous bus development due to lengthy testing site approval processes.

Supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding

relationships.description: MOT coordinates with MOF to secure infrastructure financing.

roles.Regulator: Works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators

roles.Supplier: Operates major MRT lines under license from LTA
roles.Competitor: Competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share
